overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Batman: Arkham Knight showing the character traversing rain-soaked gothic rooftops at night. The character runs along narrow walkways and open courtyards toward a massive cathedral-like building illuminated by colorful neon signage, with heavy rain and atmospheric lighting throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated rooftop walkway with stone balustrade

events.description: Batman passes close to a bright green street lamp, causing a momentary glare

agents.ego_description: Batman runs steadily along the narrow rooftop walkway, cape flowing behind him in the heavy rain

entered.detail: tall weathered red brick wall running along the right side of the path
ornate stone railing with decorative pillars along the left edge
tall decorative stone pillar with intricate gothic carvings
vintage green-topped street lamp emitting bright white light

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-slicked rooftop walkway at night, with Batman running forward along a narrow path bordered by a brick wall and stone railing. The camera follows from behind as he approaches and passes a bright green street lamp, with gothic architecture visible in the misty distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop courtyard with scattered stone barriers

events.description: exits narrow walkway and enters more open rooftop courtyard area

agents.ego_description: Batman rounds the corner and maneuvers through a courtyard with scattered stone barriers and blocks

entered.detail: large rectangular stone blocks and construction barriers scattered across the rooftop
ornate stone structure with multiple arched openings

segments.scene_description: Moving from the confined walkway into a more open rooftop courtyard, Batman navigates around large stone barriers while the rain continues to fall. The green street lamp recedes to the left as a prominent gothic archway structure comes into view ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rooftop plaza approaching neon-lit gothic cathedral

events.description: colorful neon signage on the distant cathedral becomes visible, adding vibrant purple and blue light to the scene

agents.ego_description: Batman runs across the open rooftop toward a massive gothic building topped with vibrant neon signage

entered.detail: massive gothic cathedral with tall spires and colorful neon signage illuminating the peak
grand stone archway entrance at the base of the cathedral

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a wide rooftop plaza as Batman approaches an imposing gothic cathedral. Colorful neon signage atop the building becomes visible around 22 seconds, casting vibrant hues across the rain-soaked stone. The character continues running toward the large archway entrance as the camera tilts slightly upward to capture the grandeur of the neon-lit structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across rain-slicked gothic rooftops that transition from a narrow, confined walkway into a vast, neon-lit plaza. It begins with Batman running forward along a tight path bordered by brick and stone, passing beneath the glow of a bright green street lamp. As the camera follows him out of the narrow corridor, the scene opens into a rooftop courtyard where he navigates around large stone barriers while the green light recedes into the distance. The environment then expands into a wide plaza, revealing an imposing gothic cathedral adorned with colorful neon signage that casts vibrant hues across the wet stone. Finally, the camera tilts upward to capture the grandeur of the illuminated structure as Batman runs toward the massive archway entrance.
